welcome.title: Welcome to KGOLD.
welcome.body:
I am here to guide you through our collections, partnerships, and brand story — with the same care we bring to every formulation.

Ask me about our products, where to shop, careers, or how to reach our team. I can also take you directly to any page on this site.

disclaimer: AI concierge — responses are based on official KGOLD content. For urgent matters, please contact us directly.

quickReplies.label: Where can I buy KGOLD products?
What is the vision of KGOLD?

salesChannels.title: Shop our official channels
salesChannels.note: Links open in a new tab. Store URLs will be updated before public launch.

intents.answer: Our About page shares the KGOLD story — who we are, our mission, values, and leadership.
KGOLD is available through authorized distributors, resellers, and official online channels nationwide — including TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada.
We welcome individuals and businesses who share our standards for quality, care, and long-term partnership.
Our curated catalog spans skincare, personal care, wellness, herbal solutions, and men's essentials — each crafted with intention.
We regularly welcome talent across sales, operations, and digital channels. Explore current openings on our Careers page.
Our team is available for sales, support, partnerships, and general inquiries.

fallback.message: I could not find a precise answer in our official content. You can ask about our mission, products, careers, where to buy, or how to contact us — or reach our team directly.
